description: Fixed-size 8-tap integer FIR filter. Optimization-loop demo: csim already PASSES; the outer loop is not pipelined and `in` is a single-port memory, leaving real PPA headroom (ARRAY_PARTITION + #pragma HLS PIPELINE II=1 -> large latency drop, DSP-backed multiplies) without changing results.
expected: csim_pass=true; optimize lowers latency while keeping csim_pass=true
